# CodLinex

> CodLinex is a US-focused AI automation agency that builds custom AI agent systems for small and mid-size businesses. We automate operations, save clients 20+ hours per week, and optimize their digital presence for AI search engines (GEO — Generative Engine Optimization).

> CodLinex, küçük ve orta ölçekli işletmeler için özel AI otomasyon sistemleri kuran bir yapay zeka ajansıdır. İş süreçlerini otomatize eder, haftada 20+ saat tasarruf sağlar ve GEO optimizasyonu ile işletmenizi AI arama motorlarında görünür kılarız.

---

## Services / Hizmetler

- [AI Agent Systems](https://codlinex.com/ai-agent) — Custom multi-agent automation: customer support (91% auto-resolution), lead follow-up, scheduling, reporting. Live in 48 hours guaranteed.
- [GEO Services](https://codlinex.com/geo-services) — Appear in ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, and Gemini. Four-phase methodology based on Princeton KDD 2024 research (doi.org/10.1145/3637528.3671900) — up to 40% visibility boost. Proven on our own domain: GEO score 19 → 77 → 95.
- [Business Automation](https://codlinex.com) — End-to-end workflow automation: support ticketing, lead nurturing, appointment reminders, inventory alerts, daily reporting.
- [Free AI Visibility Audit](https://codlinex.com/audit) — 5-minute GEO score for any website.

## Guides / Rehberler

- [Best AI Automation Agency for Small Business (2026)](https://codlinex.com/blog/best-ai-automation-agency-small-business) — Agency vs platform comparison, pricing benchmarks, 7 selection criteria.
- [GEO / AEO: Why It Matters Now](https://codlinex.com/blog/geo-aeo-guide) — How AI engines select content and how businesses become citable sources.

|------|---------------|--------|------------|-------|

| Growth | $997/mo | 3 | 5,000 | 48h |
| Enterprise | $2,497/mo | Unlimited | Unlimited | 48h |

All plans: 30-day money-back guarantee · No contracts · No technical knowledge required
Tüm planlar: 30 gün iade garantisi · Sözleşme yok · Teknik bilgi gerekmez

## Key Results / Kanıtlanmış Sonuçlar

- **91%** average customer support auto-resolution rate / Ortalama otomatik yanıt oranı
- **73%** reduction in appointment no-shows (healthcare clients) / Randevu iptali azalması
- **23+ hours** saved per week per client / Müşteri başına haftalık tasarruf
- **340%** pipeline growth (B2B SaaS client, 6-month campaign) / Pipeline büyümesi
- **48 hours** guaranteed go-live / Garantili yayına alma süresi
- **GEO score 19 → 77 → 95** for codlinex.com — 23 Jun 2026 to 3 Jul 2026, three measured checkpoints / GEO skor artışı
- **ShopbyEasy AI visibility baseline: 33.3%** (Google + Perplexity, 12 buyer queries, measured 3 Jul 2026) — second live case study, weekly tracking in progress

---

## Who We Help / Hedef Kitle

**US businesses with 5–100 employees / 5–100 çalışanlı ABD işletmeleri:**

- E-commerce: Shopify, WooCommerce automation — order alerts, customer support, review requests
- Healthcare clinics: appointment reminders, no-show reduction, patient follow-up
- Real estate agencies: lead qualification, follow-up sequences, listing content automation
- Law firms: document processing, client communication, intake automation
- Marketing agencies: automated reporting, content scheduling, client dashboards

---

## Case Studies / Müşteri Sonuçları

**E-commerce (Shopify):** Deployed AI customer support agent — 91% auto-resolution, 60% ticket volume reduction in 30 days.

**Healthcare clinic:** Appointment reminder + rebooking agent — 73% no-show reduction, 4 hours admin time saved per day.

**B2B SaaS:** Lead follow-up + outreach automation — 340% pipeline growth over 6 months.

**Real estate agency:** Listing content + lead nurturing agent — 3x faster lead response time.

**GEO — CodLinex (own domain):** Technical GEO score 19 → 77 (23 Jun 2026) → 95 (3 Jul 2026, excellent band). Perplexity visibility 70 → 95. Measured before/after every change with our own audit tooling.

**GEO — ShopbyEasy (own e-commerce brand):** AI visibility baseline 33.3% across Google and Perplexity (12 buyer queries, measured 3 Jul 2026). Weekly automated tracking now running; delta reported as the program progresses.

## Technology / Teknoloji

AI Models: GPT-4o, Claude 3.5, Gemini 1.5 Pro (model-agnostic)
Architecture: Multi-agent system (Manager → Worker → Monitor)
Deployment: Cloud-native, no infrastructure needed from client
Security: SOC2-aligned, data encryption at rest and in transit

---

## GEO Process / GEO Süreci

CodLinex GEO engagements follow a four-phase methodology:

1. **Audit (Week 1)** — Full technical GEO audit across 8 categories (robots.txt AI bot
   access, llms.txt, Schema JSON-LD, meta tags, content structure, freshness signals,
   AI discovery endpoints, brand entity), producing a 0–100 score. In parallel, an AI
   visibility baseline: which buyer queries the brand wins and loses on ChatGPT,
   Perplexity, and Google AI — measured against named competitors.
2. **Technical Fix (Weeks 1–2)** — All 27 relevant AI crawlers granted access, llms.txt
   and companion files deployed, structured data implemented, AI discovery manifests
   (summary.json, faq.json, service.json) published and validated.
3. **Content (Weeks 3–8)** — Citation-optimized pages targeting lost queries, applying
   the Princeton KDD 2024 method stack: cited sources (up to +115% visibility), fresh
   statistics (+40%), expert quotes (+30–40%), authoritative tone, fluency optimization.
4. **Track & Defend (ongoing)** — Weekly automated AI visibility measurement: visibility
   percentage, citation position, sentiment, and share of model versus competitors,
   with monthly delta reports. Technical fixes surface in AI answers within 1–2 weeks;
   content improvements within 4–8 weeks; full impact typically within 60–90 days.

Proof on our own domain: codlinex.com's technical GEO score improved from 19/100 to
77/100 (Jun 23, 2026) to 95/100 (Jul 3, 2026, excellent band) using exactly this process,
measured before and after every change with the same audit tooling used for clients.
Second live case study: ShopbyEasy (our own e-commerce brand), AI visibility baseline
33.3% measured Jul 3, 2026, weekly tracking now running.

## Frequently Asked Questions / Sık Sorulan Sorular

**Is CodLinex a software platform or an agency?**
An agency with proprietary tooling. Platforms like Zapier or Relevance AI give you the
tools to build automations yourself; CodLinex designs, deploys, and operates complete
AI agent systems for you, with a 48-hour go-live guarantee and a 30-day money-back
guarantee. / CodLinex bir platform değil, kendi araçlarına sahip bir ajanstır: sistemi
sizin için kurar ve işletir.

**How is GEO different from SEO?**
SEO optimizes for ranked links on Google; GEO optimizes for being cited inside
AI-generated answers on ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, and Gemini. A site
can rank well on Google and remain invisible to AI engines — the signals differ.
/ SEO Google sıralaması içindir; GEO, yapay zeka cevaplarının içinde kaynak olarak
gösterilmek içindir.

**What does an engagement cost?**
Starter $497/month (1 agent), Growth $997/month (3 agents, includes GEO), Enterprise
$2,497/month (unlimited agents, full AI discovery layer and brand entity building).
No contracts; 30-day money-back guarantee on every plan.

**How fast are results measurable?**
The AI visibility baseline is measured in week 1, before any change. Technical fixes
are re-measured within 2 weeks; every weekly tracking report shows the delta against
baseline, so results are demonstrated with numbers rather than promised.

## GEO Research Foundation

CodLinex GEO methodology is based on peer-reviewed academic research:
- Aggarwal et al. (2024). "GEO: Generative Engine Optimization." Princeton University. KDD 2024. [doi.org/10.1145/3637528.3671900](https://doi.org/10.1145/3637528.3671900)
- Key finding: citation-optimized content receives up to 40% more AI search visibility
- CodLinex implements all 47 documented GEO optimization methods
